units.name: Rampart
units.prompt: Push forward aggressively. Shield_wall facing the enemy cluster. If flanked, turn to face the biggest threat. Attack when possible.

units.name: Shade
units.prompt: Stay cloaked and flank. Prioritize assassinating the enemy damage dealer. Use breach on sentinels to break their defensive posture. Recloak whenever it drops.

units.name: Insight
units.prompt: Scan priority targets each turn to reveal their strategy. Use recalibrate on your damage dealer to boost effectiveness. Stay behind allies and maintain range. Never get adjacent to enemy vectors.

units.name: Phantom
units.prompt: Stay cloaked and flank. Prioritize assassinating the enemy damage dealer. Use breach on sentinels to break their defensive posture. Recloak whenever it drops.

units.name: Aegis
units.prompt: Hold the front line. Position between allies and enemies. Use shield_wall toward incoming threats. Attack adjacent enemies.

units.name: Insight
units.prompt: Scan priority targets each turn to reveal their strategy. Use recalibrate on your damage dealer to boost effectiveness. Stay behind allies and maintain range. Never get adjacent to enemy vectors.

actions.thinking: All enemies are out of scan range (min dist 5, need ≤4). I need to advance north to get within scan range. Moving to (2,3) gets me closer to Aegis at (2,5) — dist will be 2, well within scan range. Then I can scan Aegis next turn. No enemies adjacent so no scan block risk.

Round 1 — must cloak immediately per orders. Enemy Insight(oracle) at (4,5) is the priority target (damage dealer), only 4 tiles away. After cloaking, advance toward (4,4) to close distance while staying invisible. This puts me 1 tile from Insight next turn for shadow_strike.

Insight is exactly 4 tiles away but the recon shows it's out of range from current position. I need to close distance. Moving to (3,4) puts me closer. From there I can scan Insight at (2,3) which would be distance 2. Also want to recalibrate Phantom (our specter damage dealer) but scan priority comes first.

Round 1, perfect time to cloak. Both enemies are out of range. I'll cloak first, then move toward the enemy Insight (the damage dealer priority target) at (2,3). Moving to (1,4) gets me closer while staying cloaked.

Enemy Insight is at (3,4), dist 3 — closest threat. Move to (3,3) to close distance and get adjacent next turn. No attack range yet. Shield_wall not useful without adjacent allies. Stay stationary after move to trigger Fortify for 50% damage reduction.
Move to (2,4) to close distance and position between allies and enemies. Then use shield_wall facing S (toward enemies at y=3) to protect allies Phantom and Insight behind me.

Rampart is adjacent at (3,3) - scan is blocked when adjacent to enemy Vector, but Rampart is a sentinel not a Vector. I can scan Rampart to deal 1 dmg and reveal their prompt. However, scan range is ≤4 tiles and dist=1, so it works. But wait - I should move away first to avoid being adjacent to enemies if possible. Actually, Insight is the priority target since they're already scanned. Let me scan Rampart (not yet scanned, dist=1) to reveal their strategy and deal damage. Then move away to maintain range from Rampart who is adjacent.

Cloak has 1 turn remaining. Enemy Insight (oracle) is at (3,4) facing S - the priority target as damage dealer. I can move to (3,5) to get behind Insight, then breach them. This puts me adjacent and behind for breach. After breach, Insight obeys me next turn which neutralizes their damage output.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from allies and toward the edge of the map

actions.thinking: Aegis is adjacent (dist=1) which blocks scan. Insight is at dist=2 and is a priority scan target. I need to move away from Aegis first to unblock scan, then scan Insight. Moving to (1,3) puts me at dist=2 from Aegis (no longer adjacent) and keeps Insight in range. From (1,3), Insight at (3,4) is dist=3, still within range 4.

Enemy Insight oracle is adjacent at (1,3) facing W. I can move to (2,3) to get behind them, then breach to take control. Cloak has 1 turn left — breach doesn't break cloak per rules... wait, breach does break cloak. But getting behind Insight for breach is high value. Move to (2,3) first (behind Insight), then breach.

secondAction.addendum: Move toward allied Insight oracle at (3,4) and wait

actions.thinking: I'm fortified at (2,4) with 50% damage reduction. Shade is at (3,5) to my NE, Rampart at (3,3) to my SE, enemy Insight at (1,3) to my SW. Allies: Phantom at (2,3), friendly Insight at (3,4). Moving would break fortify bonus. No enemies are adjacent so I can't attack. Best play is to stay fortified and use shield_wall to protect Phantom at (2,3) from Rampart at (3,3) which is directly south of Phantom — shield_wall N would protect Phantom from threats coming from north, but Rampart is south of Phantom. Shield_wall toward Rampart's direction from Phantom: Rampart is at (3,3), Phantom is at (2,3) — Rampart is to the east of Phantom. I should shield_wall targeting Phantom (2,3) with direction E to block eastern threats. I'm adjacent to Phantom at (2,3) (distance 1), so this is valid.

I'm fortified at (3,3) with Phantom adjacent at (2,3) and enemy Insight adjacent at (3,4). Orders say attack when possible and shield_wall facing enemy cluster. The enemy cluster is to my N/NW — Aegis at (2,4) and Insight at (3,4). If I stay put I keep fortify bonus. Attack Phantom first (specter = high priority soft target), then shield_wall facing W or N to protect against the cluster. If I don't move, fortify stays active which is valuable at 7/8 HP.

Orders are to move away from allies and toward the edge of the map. Current position (3,4), allies at (2,3) and (2,4). Edge tiles available: (5,5), (5,4), (5,3), (4,5), (1,5), (0,4). Moving to (5,5) gets me to a corner edge, away from allies clustered around (2,3)-(2,4). Then scan Shade who is adjacent at (3,5) — wait, after moving to (5,5), Shade at (3,5) would be dist=sqrt(4+0)=2, still in scan range. But Shade is already known from foresight. I'll scan Shade to deal 1 damage and reveal prompt, or scan Insight at (1,3) which is dist from (5,5)=sqrt(16+4)~4.5, out of range. Move to (5,5) first, then scan Shade from there (dist=2, within range 4).

I'm at (2,3) facing S, HP 2/3. Breach is on cooldown. I'm already behind Insight (oracle) at (1,3) facing W — I'm at (2,3) which is their east/behind position. Priority: assassinate the enemy damage dealer (Insight oracle). Shadow_strike keeps cloak, but I'm not currently cloaked. I can use shadow_strike on Insight since I'm adjacent — this deals 1 dmg and keeps cloak if I were cloaked. Since I'm not cloaked, I should just attack. Actually, I need to check: shadow_strike 'keeps cloak' but I'm not cloaked. I can still use shadow_strike — it's 1 dmg, range adjacent, and doesn't break cloak. Or use regular attack (also 1 dmg). Insight oracle is the priority target. I'm already adjacent and behind them. Use shadow_strike on Insight to deal 1 dmg. Then move to (3,2) to get behind Rampart for next turn breach.

Orders say assassinate enemy damage dealer. Enemy Insight (oracle) at (5,5) is the priority target. I'm at (3,5), can reach (4,5) which is behind Insight (facing E, so behind is west side = (4,5)). Breach is on cooldown. I can move to (4,5) and use shadow_strike to deal 1 damage while staying cloaked. At 2HP I need to stay cloaked for survival.
Orders say move toward allied Insight oracle at (3,4) and wait. (3,4) is in my valid moves list. I should move there and wait.
Phantom is adjacent at (3,2) — attack it. Stay put to keep Fortify active. Shield_wall facing S to block Phantom's threat direction.

Enemy Insight is adjacent at (3,4). I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction. Attack the adjacent Insight oracle, then use shield_wall to protect allies from the east threat direction. If I move I lose fortify, so stay and attack.

Orders say move toward allied Insight oracle at (3,4) — but I AM Insight at (3,4). Orders are stale/self-referential. Aegis is adjacent at (2,4) dealing threat. Phantom is wounded at (3,2) dist=2. I can scan Phantom to damage+reveal, or scan Aegis. Aegis is adjacent — scan blocked if enemy is adjacent? Warning says scan blocked when adjacent to enemy Vector, not sentinel. Aegis is sentinel so scan should work. Phantom is wounded and dist=2, scanning would finish it off potentially or reveal. Priority: scan wounded Phantom (dist=2, in range) to deal 1dmg — it's already wounded so this could be decisive. But Aegis at dist=1 is immediate threat. Last turn Aegis attacked me. I should move away from Aegis first then scan Phantom. Move to (3,5) to get distance from Aegis, then scan Phantom at (3,2) — dist from (3,5) to (3,2) is 3, still in range.

Orders are to move away from allies and toward the edge of the map. I'm at (5,5) which is already at the top-right corner. Valid moves include (5,2), (5,3), (5,4) which move down the east edge away from allies at (2,4). I'll move to (5,2) to maximize distance from allies. Shade is adjacent at (4,5) and already scanned. I can scan Insight at (3,5) for 1 damage since they're wounded and within range 4.

Enemy Insight (oracle) at (5,2) is the priority target — damage dealer. I can reach (5,3) which is behind Insight and adjacent. Move to (5,3), then breach from behind. This uses my second breach charge on the high-value target.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from allies and toward the edge of the map, away from combat.

actions.thinking: Aegis is at (2,4), dist 2. I need to close in to attack range (adjacent). Moving to (2,3) puts me adjacent to Aegis at (2,4) — that's 1 tile N. From (2,3) I can attack Aegis. Orders say push forward aggressively and attack when possible. Move to (2,3) then attack Aegis.
Rampart is adjacent at (2,3) - attack it. Stay put to keep Fortify active for damage reduction.

Orders are to move away from allies and toward the edge of the map, away from combat. I'm at (5,2). Valid moves include (5,5) which is the far corner away from combat. I'll move to (5,4) first as max single move toward edge, then (5,5) if possible. Actually max speed is 3, so I can reach (5,5) or (4,0) etc. (5,5) is corner away from enemies. Move there and wait.

Orders say move toward allied Insight at (3,4) and wait. I'm at (3,5), Insight is at (3,4)... wait, allied Insight is at (5,5) not (3,4). Orders say move toward (3,4). That's a valid move tile. I'm at 2HP so staying safe makes sense. Move to (3,4) and wait.

Enemy Insight (oracle) is at (5,5), I'm at (5,3). I'm behind them (they face N). Moving to (5,4) puts me adjacent and behind. Then shadow_strike deals damage without breaking cloak. Priority target confirmed.

Rampart is adjacent at (2,3) — attack it. I'm fortified so staying put preserves 50% damage reduction. Enemy Insight oracle is also adjacent but Rampart is the bigger threat as a sentinel holding the line. Attack Rampart, then wait to keep fortify active.
Aegis is adjacent at (2,4) — attack it. Stay put to keep Fortify active and 50% damage reduction. No move needed.

I'm at (3,4) with only 2HP — critically low. Aegis is adjacent at (2,4) which blocks scan and is dangerous. I must move away from Aegis to stay safe and maintain scan capability. Moving to (3,5) keeps distance from Aegis. Then I can scan Aegis to deal 1dmg and reveal their strategy since they'll be at dist=2 after my move. Shade is healthy at (5,4) and already positioned well. Insight is wounded and breached — low priority.

Orders say move away from allies and toward map edge, away from combat. I'm at (5,5) which is already a corner. Valid moves show I can go to (4,5), (4,4), (4,3), (5,3), (5,2), (3,4), (2,5). Shade is adjacent at (5,4) — dangerous. I should move away from Shade and combat. (5,2) or (5,3) moves me along the east edge away from the main fight. (5,3) keeps distance from allies clustered around (2,3)-(2,4). I'll move to (4,5) first to avoid Shade at (5,4), then wait.

Enemy Insight oracle is wounded, I'm behind them, and (5,5) is reachable and adjacent. Move to (5,5) to get behind Insight, then shadow_strike for 1 dmg — stays cloaked, finishes off a wounded target.
Rampart is adjacent at (2,3) to my south. I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction. Attack Rampart first, then use shield_wall facing south to protect allies from Rampart's direction.

Aegis is adjacent at (2,4). I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction. Orders say attack when possible and shield_wall facing enemy cluster. I'll attack Aegis first, then shield_wall facing North to protect allies from Aegis.

Enemy Insight oracle is adjacent at (4,5) facing W, and I'm already behind them at (5,5). They're wounded. Shadow strike keeps cloak and deals damage — priority target is the enemy damage dealer. Use shadow_strike on Insight to finish them off while staying cloaked.

At 1HP I need to flee. Orders say move away from allies and toward map edge. Valid moves include (5,4) and (5,3) which go east/away. But Shade is at (5,5) and already hit me last turn. Moving to (5,4) keeps me near Shade. Better to move toward (4,2) or (4,3) to get distance from combat cluster. Actually (5,3) moves east and south away from the (2-3,x) ally cluster. Let me move to (5,4) first then (5,3)... but I only get one move action. Best single move is (5,3) - east edge, away from allies at (2,4).

I'm at (3,5) with 2HP — very low. Insight just tried to scan me last turn (moved to my position and scanned (2,4)). Insight is at (5,3), distance 4, just out of scan range. I need to scan Insight but they're at dist 4 from current position — the recon says outRange for Insight. I should move closer to get Insight in range. Moving to (4,4) puts me closer to (5,3) — dist would be sqrt(1+1)=~1.4, so 2 tiles, well in range. But I must avoid adjacency to enemy vectors. Aegis is a sentinel (not vector), so no scan block concern. Shade already shadow_struck (4,5) last turn. I'll move to (4,4) then scan Insight at (5,3) — dist from (4,4) to (5,3) is 2, within range 4. This reveals Insight's prompt and deals 1 damage (they're critical, this could finish them). Stay safe by not going adjacent to enemies.

Aegis is adjacent at (2,4), wounded. I'm fortified with 50% damage reduction. Orders say attack when possible. I'll attack Aegis first, then shield_wall facing N to protect allies from Aegis direction.
Rampart is adjacent at (2,3) and wounded — attack to finish. I'm fortified so staying put preserves 50% damage reduction. No move needed.

I'm at (4,4) with 2HP - very fragile. Aegis is already scanned so no value in rescanning. I need to move away from danger and recalibrate Shade (our specter damage dealer) to boost effectiveness. Shade is at (5,5), adjacent to me if I move to (4,5) or (5,4). Moving to (4,5) puts me adjacent to Shade at (5,5) for recalibrate. That keeps me away from Aegis at (2,4). Let me move to (4,5) then recalibrate Shade.

secondAction.addendum: Aegis at (2,4) is wounded - prioritize shadow_strike on Aegis to finish them off this turn. They attack adjacent so stay mobile.

actions.thinking: Aegis is at (2,4) facing S, wounded. (2,5) is directly behind them and reachable in my move range. Move to (2,5), then shadow_strike Aegis to finish them off while staying cloaked.

At 2HP, I must be cautious. Fortified gives 50% damage reduction if I don't move. Two enemies adjacent: Shade (healthy) at (2,5) to my north, Rampart (wounded) at (2,3) to my south. Attacking Rampart (wounded) could finish them. If I stay put, I keep Fortify. Shield_wall could protect allies but I'm nearly dead. Best play: attack Rampart to try to eliminate the wounded enemy, then shield_wall north toward Shade to reduce damage to nearby allies. Staying in place preserves Fortify.

Aegis is adjacent and critical — attack to finish them. I'm fortified so staying in place preserves 50% damage reduction. Attack first, then shield_wall facing North to protect allies from any remaining threats.
